title: Good practices for Dynamic Resource Allocation as a Cluster Admin — kubeletmetrics
text:
When a Pod bound to a node must have a ResourceClaim satisfied, kubelet calls
the
NodePrepareResources
and
NodeUnprepareResources
methods of the DRA
driver. You can observe this behavior from the kubelet's point of view with the
following metrics.
Kubelet NodePrepareResources: Monitor
histogram_quantile
(
0.99
,
sum
(
rate
(
dra_operations_duration_seconds_bucket
{
operation_name
=
"
PrepareResources
"}[
5m
]
))
by
(
le
))
.
Kubelet NodeUnprepareResources: Track
histogram_quantile
(
0.99
,
sum
(
rate
(
dra_operations_duration_seconds_bucket
{
operation_name
=
"
UnprepareResources
"}[
5m
]
))
by
(
le
))
.
